Shell script to compile and run unit tests for base64 encoding and decoding.

# Purpose
This script is a shell executable that compiles and runs a C program for unit testing. It uses the GNU Compiler Collection (`gcc`) to compile the source files `test_base64.c` and `base64.c`, including headers from the parent directory with the `-I../` option. The script specifies the C99 standard with the `-std=c99` flag and includes debugging information with the `-g` flag. The `-DUNIT_TEST` flag is used to define a preprocessor macro for unit testing purposes. After successful compilation, the script executes the resulting binary `a.out`.
